response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified song 'お気に召すまま' by Eve from on-screen text. 2. Identified performers as the group 'TAN'. 3. Searched for the original lyrics of 'お気に召すまま' and found full Japanese lyrics and verified the song's composer. 4. Created English translation of the lyrics. 5. Mapped scenes: 00:00-01:18 (Title/Intro), 01:18-01:27 (Prep), 01:27-04:59 (Performance). 6. Compiled all data into JSON.
response.global_summary: The video is a 3D live performance of the song 'Okinimesumama' by the VTuber group 'TAN'. The video includes a title screen and an intro before the full performance of the song.

scenes.description: Title card and introductory scene showing the group and the song title 'Okinimesumama'. No vocal music is playing.
Characters interact and prepare for the performance. No vocal music is playing.
The vocal performance of 'Okinimesumama' begins and continues to the end. Performers dance and sing.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Indifferently, I spat out the words
Crying over such memories
Why don't we end it today?
Waiting for the 1, 2 signal
You and me, holding hands
It was my brave action, phase
You don't have to stop
It's so hollow, this life
Don't say you can't, don't say it
Don't say it's too late now
Now, come on, come on, we form a circle and start spinning
Gradually I come to hate it, but then I love it
Hey, hey, I don't know, even my self-meetings
More and more, we get close, but then drift apart
Pa-pa, riding on the sound, we start to dance
I come to hate it so much, but then I love it
Hey, hey, I don't know, from here on out forever
Shake shake my heart, yeah

Hey, hey, I don't know, even my self-meetings
